narrative:
Cols 82-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 3,192 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
